name: Baseball Bat
description: A sturdy improvised club suited to straightforward heavy swings.

rankNotes._: Uses the High weapon damage progression table.

profiles.sourceNote: weapons R0 Baseball Bat Basic Attack

profiles.description: A solid impact sends the target skidding backward.
profiles.trigger: When this weapon's attack critically hits
profiles.sourceNote: weapons R0 Baseball Bat Critical Effect

name: Kitchen Knife
description: A small improvised blade that is easy to carry and dangerous up close.

rankNotes._: Uses the High weapon damage progression table.

profiles.sourceNote: weapons R0 Kitchen Knife Basic Attack

profiles.description: A well-placed cut leaves the foe bleeding.
profiles.trigger: When this weapon's attack critically hits
profiles.sourceNote: weapons R0 Kitchen Knife Critical Effect

name: Rock / Brick
description: A common improvised projectile meant to be hurled at short range.

profiles.notes: Attack text lists Range 5 even though the weapon tag is Thrown 4; the profile preserves the attack text.

rankNotes._: Uses the Medium weapon damage progression table.

profiles.sourceNote: weapons R0 Rock / Brick Basic Attack

profiles.description: A lucky strike rattles the target's senses.
profiles.trigger: When this weapon's attack critically hits
profiles.sourceNote: weapons R0 Rock / Brick Critical Effect

name: Broomstick
description: A long improvised staff that can keep foes a little farther away.

rankNotes._: Uses the Medium weapon damage progression table.

profiles.description: The sweeping strike knocks the target off their feet.
profiles.trigger: When this weapon's attack critically hits

name: Longsword
description: A standard all-purpose sword that balances control, damage, and flexible grip.

rankNotes._: Uses the Medium weapon damage progression table.

profiles.description: A deep cut opens a dangerous wound.
profiles.trigger: When this weapon's attack critically hits

name: Katana
description: A two-handed sword built around precision cuts and quick-draw strikes.

rankNotes._: Uses the Medium weapon damage progression table.

profiles.description: Quick-draw cuts are harder to defend against.
profiles.trigger: When attacking while the Katana is sheathed
profiles.onSuccess: Target is Off-Guard 1 to the attack

notes: Has the Iaijutsu trait in the handbook.

name: Bow
description: A quiet ranged weapon that rewards accurate shots from a distance.

rankNotes._: Uses the Low weapon damage progression table.

name: Pistol
description: A concealable firearm that offers solid ranged damage and rapid spray fire.

rankNotes._: Uses the Medium weapon damage progression table.

profiles.description: You shoot several times in rapid succession.
profiles.notes: You must reload after using this action.
profiles.sourceNote: weapons R1 Pistol Alternate Use - Bullet Spray

name: Daggers / Kunai
description: Small concealable blades that work in melee or as thrown weapons.

rankNotes._: Uses the Low weapon damage progression table.

profiles.sourceNote: weapons R1 Daggers / Kunai Basic Attack (Melee)

rankNotes._: Uses the Low weapon damage progression table.

profiles.sourceNote: weapons R1 Daggers / Kunai Basic Attack (Thrown)

name: Shuriken
description: Light thrown blades used to harass, distract, and pressure enemies at range.

profiles.notes: Current handbook damage is below the standard Rank 1 weapon damage table; preserved as written.

profiles.description: You aim not to injure, but to distract the target.
profiles.sourceNote: weapons R1 Shuriken Alternate Use - Distracting Attack

name: Greatsword
description: A massive two-handed blade built for heavy cleaving strikes.

rankNotes._: Uses the Extreme weapon damage progression table.

profiles.description: Your swing continues through the first enemy and clips a second nearby foe.
profiles.trigger: When this weapon's attack critically hits
profiles.onCriticalSuccess: Deal Hits damage to a target adjacent to the original target and within this weapon's reach

name: Shield
description: A defensive weapon used to block attacks and bash enemies backward.

profiles.notes: Current handbook damage is below the standard Rank 1 weapon damage table; preserved as written.

profiles.description: You swing your weapon to knock away your enemies.
profiles.onSuccess: Push the target 1 additional square for every hit that exceeds their Defense
profiles.sourceNote: weapons R1 Shield Alternate Use - Bash

name: Rifle
description: A long-range firearm built for accurate, armor-piercing shots.

rankNotes._: Uses the High weapon damage progression table.

name: Axe
description: A chopping weapon that hits hard and tears through armor.

rankNotes._: Uses the High weapon damage progression table.

profiles.description: A brutal chop damages and deforms the target's armor.
profiles.trigger: When this weapon's attack critically hits
profiles.onCriticalSuccess: Permanently reduce the target's armor (if any) by 1

name: Warhammer
description: A heavy blunt weapon built to crush tough targets and leave them reeling.

rankNotes._: Uses the Extreme weapon damage progression table.

profiles.description: The hammer lands with a concussive impact that dazes the enemy.
profiles.trigger: When this weapon's attack critically hits

name: Spear
description: A versatile polearm that combines extended melee reach with thrown utility.

rankNotes._: Uses the Medium weapon damage progression table.

name: Staff
description: A balanced blunt weapon suited to defense, control, and sweeping strikes.

rankNotes._: Uses the Low weapon damage progression table.

profiles.description: The sweep catches the target's legs and sends them down.
profiles.trigger: When this weapon's attack critically hits

name: Shotgun
description: A loud close-range firearm that can blast several targets at once.

rankNotes._: Uses the High weapon damage progression table.

profiles.description: You shoot a wide blast of pellets.
profiles.onSuccess: Reduce the damage based on distance to the target (every square is -1 damage)
profiles.notes: You must reload after using this action.
profiles.sourceNote: weapons R1 Shotgun Alternate Use - Buckshot Blast

name: Gunblade
description: A large sword with a built-in gun barrel that uses explosive force to enhance its slashes.
notes: Tags and exact mechanics are not yet defined in the handbook.

name: Chain Sword
description: A motorized blade capable of chewing through armor and dealing devastating damage.
notes: Tags and exact mechanics are not yet defined in the handbook.

name: Grenade Launcher
description: A ranged launcher that lobs explosive munitions into an area.
notes: Tags and exact mechanics are not yet defined in the handbook.

name: Machine Gun
description: A rapid-fire ranged weapon built to overwhelm targets with sustained fire.
notes: Tags and exact mechanics are not yet defined in the handbook.

name: Rocket Launcher
description: A ranged weapon that launches explosive ammunition to deal area damage.
notes: Tags and exact mechanics are not yet defined in the handbook.

name: Force Field Projector
description: A device that generates a protective energy field around the user.
notes: Tags and exact mechanics are not yet defined in the handbook.

name: Laser / Plasma Blaster
description: A ranged weapon that fires concentrated light or superheated plasma.
notes: Handbook notes possible no-reload or stun-setting variations; tags and exact mechanics are not yet defined.

name: Railgun / Coilgun
description: An electromagnetic weapon that launches projectiles at extremely high speeds.
notes: Tags and exact mechanics are not yet defined in the handbook.

name: Whip-sword
description: A sword whose blade can extend outward like a whip to strike from farther away.
notes: Tags and exact mechanics are not yet defined in the handbook.

name: Beam Cannon
description: A high-powered heavy ranged weapon that fires a concentrated particle beam in a line.
notes: Tags and exact mechanics are not yet defined in the handbook.

name: Disintegration Beam
description: A tentative high-rank beam weapon concept built to erase targets entirely.
notes: Tentative name in the handbook; tags and exact mechanics are not yet defined.

name: Satellite Cannon
description: A high-rank superweapon concept that calls down a devastating blast from above.
notes: Tags and exact mechanics are not yet defined in the handbook.

name: Nuclear Fusion Weapon
description: A catastrophic weapon concept that fires miniature suns at the enemy.
notes: Tags and exact mechanics are not yet defined in the handbook.
